title: Provider rules
description: Conditional letter policies evaluated after base product/price resolution. Zone scope follows the resolved product + graph.edges (no duplicate zones array on rules). Amounts for surcharges come from prices/services.json via service_id.

unit.description: Measurement units for metrics referenced in rules (same idea as products.unit). Keys align with rule.metric names.

thickness.description: Unit for metric `thickness`; min_exclusive/max_inclusive are in millimetres.

id.description: Stable rule id for logs and SDK line items

kind.description: When the resolved metric value lies in (min_exclusive, max_inclusive], attach service_id surcharge

metric.description: Logical metric name; physical unit comes from document `unit` (e.g. unit.thickness mm). Add enum values only with SDK support.

description.description: Human note; verify against operator tariff

product_ids.description: Native product ids this rule applies to

min_exclusive.description: Apply when metric value > this bound (e.g. 20 mm for metric thickness meaning >2 cm)

max_inclusive.description: Apply when metric value <= this bound (e.g. 50 mm for metric thickness meaning <=5 cm)

service_id.description: Native services.json id; must have a row in prices/services.json
